## 5 · BUILD ORDER

1. **Scaffold + tokens.** Register literal values once.
2. **Responsive + a11y floor.** Keep keyboard access and small-screen layout intact.

## 6 · ANTI-SLOP GUARDRAILS

- Do not substitute a generic product card for the visible composition.
- Do not round literal token values.
- Do not add excess animation; honor reduced motion.
